§6Iodine-131§f

§aExtremely radioactive fission product — ~6.3% of short-lived nuclear waste!§f

§bIodine-131§f (Radioiodine) is an extremely radioactive and hazardous iodine isotope. It is naturally pyrophoric.

§6Production§f:
§b• Short-Lived Nuclear Waste§f — I-131 makes up ~6.3% of short-lived waste on average

§eTip§f: I-131 is a significant component of fission products from PUREX reprocessing. While currently limited in direct use, it contributes to the overall radioactivity of short-lived waste and must be managed!
